response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience with direct alignment to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, exactly matching the role's required AI agent development experience. Strong craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, CI/CD) and breadth across cloud, containerization, and multiple languages including Java fits the secondary stack requirement.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React with current AI-agent and MCP work
15+ years across full stack with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB
Strong engineering practices: TDD, trunk-based development, founder of OSS platform
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate divided stack depth
